functional_requirements.title: Product Search & Discovery
functional_requirements.description: Users can search products by keyword, category, and filters.
acceptance_criteria: Search returns results within 500ms for queries with ≥2 characters

functional_requirements.title: Shopping Cart Management
functional_requirements.description: Users can add, remove, and update quantities of items in their cart.
acceptance_criteria: Cart persists across page refreshes via localStorage

functional_requirements.title: User Registration & Login
functional_requirements.description: New users can register and existing users can log in.
acceptance_criteria: Registration requires email + password ≥8 chars; login returns JWT

functional_requirements.title: Order History
functional_requirements.description: Logged-in users can view their past orders with status and items.
acceptance_criteria: Order list loads in ≤2s; shows date, total, and status per order

user_stories.so_that: I find what I need quickly without browsing all categories

user_stories.i_want: to filter search results by price range
user_stories.so_that: I only see products I can afford

user_stories.i_want: to add a product to my cart
user_stories.so_that: I can purchase multiple items in a single checkout

user_stories.i_want: to update item quantities in my cart
user_stories.so_that: I can buy more or fewer units without removing and re-adding

user_stories.i_want: to create an account with email and password
user_stories.so_that: I can track my orders and save my preferences

user_stories.i_want: to log in with my credentials
user_stories.so_that: I can access my account and order history
I can track deliveries and reorder items I liked

user_stories.i_want: to filter orders by date range
user_stories.so_that: I can find a specific past purchase quickly

test_cases_inline.title: Login returns JWT on valid credentials
